name: SwingCity Golf
about: SwingCity Golf is an indoor golf and social lounge in Bowling Green, KY. The facility utilizes state-of-the-art Trackman simulators to provide a year-round golf experience for players of all skill levels. Patrons can enjoy world-class golf courses, a relaxing lounge area, and a full food and drink menu. The venue is designed for both casual play and competitive events, offering various membership options and private event hosting.
why_golfers_like_it: Trackman simulators provide industry-leading accuracy and realistic graphics
Relaxed lounge atmosphere perfect for unwinding after a game
Year-round access to golf regardless of weather conditions

food_and_drink.notes: Kitchen available with delicious eats crafted to satisfy all tastes
Full bar available with refreshing drinks

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The text does not specify whether they provide club rentals, so it's recommended to bring your own clubs or contact the venue directly.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue has its own kitchen and bar, offering a variety of food and drinks for purchase. Outside food and drink are not mentioned as being permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The text does not specify the duration for a full 18 holes, as it depends on the simulator software and the players' pace.

faq.question: Is SwingCity Golf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is described as perfect for guests of all ages and is available for birthday parties, indicating a welcoming environment for children.
